creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #4)
IIRC, earlier version of cmcurl had a hard requirements only on bundled cmnghttp2 and system curl can utilise only system version of libnghttp2

Both bundled or both unbundled. 

Now we can use system libidn2/libnghttp2 for bundled cmcurl and this is fine.
